step_by_step_thinking: The orbital environment is typically more favorable for B-cell proliferation, given its rich vascular supply and immune-rich tissue. Additionally, B-cell non-Hodgkin’s lymphomas often present with extranodal involvement due to their role in mucosa-associated lymphoid tissues (MALT). A: B-cell
